import React from'react';/**
 * Utility to format numbers as Indian Rupee (₹)
 * Uses Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN') for standard Indian comma grouping (1,00,000)
 */import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const formatPrice=amount=>{return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN',{style:'currency',currency:'INR',maximumFractionDigits:amount%1===0?0:2}).format(amount).replace('INR','₹').trim();};const PriceFormatter=_ref=>{let{amount,className=''}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:className,children:formatPrice(amount)});};export default PriceFormatter;
